response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a performance by Tokino Sora, with song titles visible on the screen during the performances. 2. Divided the video into scenes based on music performance and talk: 00:00-00:58 (Diva), 00:58-01:07 (bridge), 01:07-04:23 (Dancing Reed), 04:23-04:40 (talk). 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for 'Diva' and 'Dancing Reed'. 4. Verified the lyrics and assembled the JSON according to the requested schema.
response.global_summary: The video features VTuber Tokino Sora performing two of her original songs, 'Diva' and 'Dancing Reed', as part of her birthday event, followed by closing remarks.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Holding a prayer to my beating heart
I draw an ambiguous dream
I cannot end this fantasy as just imagination
I keep searching for the answer endlessly
Wanting to become someone
I just watched the evening shower falling sorrowfully
If you gently nestle close and my heart clears up
I feel like I have grown wings
Because I will always be by your side
Singing by weaving words is my destiny
Overwriting even the common emptiness in the world
Like a flower blooming in a back alley
Longing for a small light that illuminates my wish
God won't recognize a song without a name
Like flowers that don't wither one by one
Saying goodbye to yesterday's self
Is it okay if I can't smile even with overflowing tears?
Because the ideal keeps moving further away
It's already a mess
No matter how much I reach out and scream, it doesn't reach
I believe that if I wish for it, it will come true someday
May the song resonate
Ah, the heartbeat is noisy again today
I can't stand because I'm just blocked
I will find you from a soundless world and take you out
Singing by weaving words is my destiny
Overwriting even the common emptiness in the world
Like a flower blooming in a back alley
Longing for a small light that illuminates my wish
I wish I could be your diva

scenes.description: A short bridge section between the two songs. No vocals.
Tokino Sora performs her song 'Dancing Reed'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Okey dokey, a reply is fine but it’s not funny if it’s a joke
Stuck in traffic or feeling unsure, which way will you go?
I stretched my hand out towards a mirage
A feverish, dreamlike tale
I pretended not to see that kind of light
My restless heartbeat, don’t leave yet
I don’t want it to be an illusion
Take me away
Alluring dancing, dancing night
Expanding, unstoppable universe
Your expression may rewrite my entire world, it's a big responsibility
Anything and everything
Dance Dance Dance We Are Dancing Reed
Excited and entangled in zero gravity
Not caring
Dance Dance Dance Just a Dance Just a Dance
Leaving my voice to the darkness
Even if you open your eyes, don’t leave me
Maybe needy, I’m not in my right mind
I won’t forget your body heat
That’s not the case for everyone
Monopolizing you, euphoria
Words that seem like I don’t care are just decoration
It can’t be wiped away like makeup
Even if it’s 360° lies
You care for me when I can’t hide myself and it makes me happy
Crazy Crazy Love
Take me away from the skyscrapers
Your expression replaces my subconscious
It’s a big responsibility
The passing neon

Floating like a glider
There was no joy or sorrow

Pay attention to me

Anything and everything

Not caring
